carousels.topic: 5 apps you can build this weekend

slides.headline: 5 apps you can clone in 48 hours
slides.body: Each making $5k-$50k/month. MIT repos included.

slides.headline: 1. Focus timer app
slides.body: PrayerLock does $12k/month. Build: Expo + RevenueCat. Niche: Faith, fitness, study. Time: 6 hours.

slides.headline: 2. Habit tracker
slides.body: Streaks makes $50k/month. Build: React Native + local storage. Add: Cute mascot (boosts retention 34%). Time: 8 hours.

slides.headline: 3. Screen time blocker
slides.body: One Sec makes $40k/month. Build: Native module + subscription. Hook: Shame users with stats. Time: 12 hours.

slides.headline: 4. Walking challenge app
slides.body: StepBet model but simpler. Build: HealthKit integration + leaderboard. Monetize: Affiliate protein/shoes. Time: 10 hours.

slides.headline: 5. AI journaling app
slides.body: Rosebud does $15k/month. Build: Text input + GPT-4 prompts. Niche: Therapy, gratitude, prayer. Time: 8 hours.

slides.headline: The playbook
slides.body: Find app making $10k+/month. Search GitHub for MIT clone. Add niche angle. Ship to App Store. Track in simulator first.

slides.headline: Get the full clone list
slides.body: 67 profitable apps with MIT repos. App Store optimization checklists. Monetization breakdowns. Link in bio.

carousels.topic: Cold email framework that books calls

slides.headline: This cold email books 23% of replies
slides.body: Tested on 2,400 sends. 8% reply rate. Here's the exact framework.

slides.headline: Subject line rules
slides.body: 3-5 words max. Question format works best. Example: 'Quick question about [their company]'. Avoid: Sales words, emojis, all caps.

slides.headline: Line 1: Specific compliment
slides.body: Reference real work they did. Example: 'Saw your post about scaling to $50k MRR without ads.' NOT: 'I love your company!'

slides.headline: Line 2: Why you
slides.body: One sentence credibility. Example: 'Built same system for 12 SaaS companies.' Include number that proves competence.

slides.headline: Line 3: The offer
slides.body: Specific value in one sentence. Example: 'Can show you how we got 340 trial signups last month for $1,200 ad spend.'

slides.headline: Line 4: Low-friction ask
slides.body: NOT: 'Book a call'. YES: 'Worth a 10-min call Tuesday?' Time-bound. Low commitment. Question format.

slides.headline: The template
slides.body:
Subject: Quick question about [company]

Saw your [specific thing].

Built [result] for [number] companies.

Can show you [specific outcome].

Worth a 10-min call [day]?

slides.headline: Get 47 subject lines that work
slides.body: Tested on 50,000+ sends. Industry-specific variations. Deliverability checklist. Link in bio.

slides.headline: Turn 1 video into 20 pieces of content
slides.body: Same effort. 20x distribution. Here's the exact workflow.

slides.headline: Step 1: Record 1 long video
slides.body: 8-12 minutes. Answer one question thoroughly. Example: 'How I built my first app'. Don't overthink it.

slides.headline: Step 2: Extract 6 short clips
slides.body: 15-60 seconds each. Each clip = one insight. Post to: TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn, Twitter. That's 30 posts already.

slides.headline: Step 3: Transcribe to text
slides.body: Run through Whisper API (free). Clean up with Claude. Now you have: Blog post, Twitter thread, LinkedIn article, newsletter.

slides.headline: Step 4: Pull quotes
slides.body: Find 10 quotable lines. Create: Quote graphics (Canva). Text posts (Twitter/LinkedIn). Story slides (Instagram). Email subject lines.

slides.headline: Step 5: Repurpose by format
slides.body: Carousel: Key points with visuals. Podcast: Audio only version. Email: Summary with CTA. Reddit: Text version with proof.

slides.headline: The math
slides.body: 1 video (30 min to make) = 6 short clips × 5 platforms = 30 posts + 1 blog + 1 thread + 1 newsletter + 10 quote graphics = 43 total pieces.

slides.headline: Get the automation workflow
slides.body: Playwright scripts for multi-platform posting. Transcription setup guide. Content calendar template. Link in bio.

slides.headline: 5 AI tools doing $50k/year jobs for $20/month
slides.body: Tested all 5. Here's what actually works and what's hype.

slides.headline: 1. Copywriter: Claude
slides.body: Replaced: $3k/month copywriter. Does: Landing pages, emails, ad copy. Cost: $20/month. Catches: Still needs human editing for voice.

slides.headline: 2. Video editor: Descript
slides.body: Replaced: $2k/month editor. Does: Cuts, captions, b-roll. Cost: $24/month. Catches: Complex animations still need human.

slides.headline: 3. Graphic designer: Midjourney + Canva
slides.body: Replaced: $2.5k/month designer. Does: Social graphics, ads, thumbnails. Cost: $30/month combined. Catches: Brand consistency needs templates.

slides.headline: 4. Research assistant: Perplexity Pro
slides.body: Replaced: $2k/month VA. Does: Market research, competitor analysis, sourcing. Cost: $20/month. Catches: Can't make judgment calls.

slides.headline: 5. Customer support: Intercom AI
slides.body: Replaced: $3k/month support agent. Does: FAQs, basic troubleshooting. Cost: $74/month. Catches: Escalation path needed for complex issues.

slides.headline: What you actually save
slides.body: Total replaced: $12.5k/month in salaries. AI tool cost: $168/month. Savings: $12,332/month. Your time: 5 hours/week managing tools.

slides.headline: My app went from 12 downloads/day to 340
slides.body: Changed 7 things. Conversion rate jumped 4.2x. Here's the exact checklist.

slides.headline: 1. Title (30 characters)
slides.body: Before: 'PrayerLock - Faith App'. After: 'PrayerLock - Focus Timer'. Put PRIMARY keyword first. Downloads jumped 180%.

slides.headline: 2. First 2 screenshots
slides.body: Show app in use. NOT splash screens. Add text overlay with benefit. Example: 'Block distractions for 30 min'. These get 80% of views.

slides.headline: 3. Keyword field (100 chars)
slides.body: No spaces. Comma-separated. Don't repeat title words. Example: 'productivity,timer,habit,focus,pomodoro'. Test with App Radar.

slides.headline: 4. Description first 3 lines
slides.body: Only lines visible before 'more' tap. Lead with problem + solution. Example: 'Can't focus? PrayerLock blocks apps until timer ends.'

slides.headline: 5. App preview video
slides.body: 15-30 seconds max. Show core feature in first 3 seconds. Portrait mode. No talking needed. Conversion boost: 23%.

slides.headline: 6. Review responses
slides.body: Reply to ALL reviews within 24 hours. Especially 1-3 stars. Boosts ranking algorithm. Takes 10 min/day.

slides.headline: Get the full ASO playbook
slides.body: Screenshot templates. Keyword research process. A/B testing framework. Link in bio.

slides.headline: 7 growth tactics that cost nothing
slides.body: Got 14,000 users in 6 weeks. Spent $0 on ads. Here's what worked.

slides.headline: 1. Reddit value-first posting
slides.body: Find subreddits with your audience. Answer questions thoroughly. Link to your tool in P.S. Example: r/productivity, 2,400 signups from 8 posts.

slides.headline: 2. Product Hunt launch
slides.body: Post on Tuesday-Thursday. Prep 20 friends to upvote in first hour. Respond to all comments. Result: 1,200 signups in 24 hours.

slides.headline: 3. LinkedIn founder content
slides.body: Post build-in-public updates daily. Share revenue numbers. Show behind-the-scenes. Example: '$ 3k MRR post' got 340 demo requests.

slides.headline: 4. Comparison pages
slides.body: Create '[Competitor] vs [Your Tool]' landing pages. Rank for competitor keywords. Example: 'Notion alternative' page gets 2,100 monthly visitors.

slides.headline: 5. Twitter reply strategy
slides.body: Find viral tweets in your niche. Add value in replies. Link to related content. Example: 40 replies/day = 600 profile visits = 80 signups/week.

slides.headline: 6. Integration directories
slides.body: List your tool on Zapier, Make, n8n directories. Free exposure to active users. Example: Zapier listing = 180 signups/month.

slides.headline: Get 23 more zero-cost tactics
slides.body: Step-by-step playbooks. Real examples with numbers. Community access. Link in bio.

slides.headline: Validate any idea in one weekend
slides.body: No code needed. Spent 8 hours. Got proof before building. Here's the framework.

slides.headline: Friday night: Landing page (2 hours)
slides.body: Use Carrd or Webflow. Write headline that promises outcome. Add email capture. Example: 'Get 100 leads/week without ads. Join waitlist.'

slides.headline: Saturday morning: Reddit test (1 hour)
slides.body: Post in 3 relevant subreddits. Frame as question: 'Would you use X that does Y?' Link to landing page. Target: 50+ upvotes or 10+ signups.

slides.headline: Saturday afternoon: Cold outreach (3 hours)
slides.body: Find 50 people with the problem. Email them directly. Example: 'Building X for Y. Would you pay $20/month for this?' Target: 5+ positive replies.

slides.headline: Saturday night: Twitter poll (30 min)
slides.body: Post poll asking if they'd pay. Share in relevant communities. Example: 'Would you pay $15/month for automated content posting?' Target: 40%+ yes votes.

slides.headline: Sunday: Analyze results (1 hour)
slides.body: Green flags: 25+ email signups, 10+ willing to pay, 40%+ poll yes. Red flags: No signups, vague interest, feature requests only.

slides.headline: The decision matrix
slides.body: Build it: 30+ signups + 5+ payment commitments. Pivot: Interest but wrong angle, test new positioning. Kill it: <10 signups, no payment intent.

slides.headline: Get the validation templates
slides.body: Landing page copy formulas. Cold email scripts. Subreddit lists by niche. Link in bio.

slides.headline: Post to 9 platforms in 15 minutes
slides.body: Same content. Zero copy-paste. Fully automated. Here's the system.

slides.headline: The platform stack
slides.body: Short video: TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn. Text: Twitter, LinkedIn, Reddit. Image: Instagram, Pinterest. One source file feeds all.

slides.headline: Step 1: Create master content
slides.body: Record one 60-second video vertical. OR write one 200-word post. This is your source. Everything else auto-generates from this.

slides.headline: Step 2: Format variations
slides.body: Video: 9:16 for TikTok/Reels, 1:1 for feed posts. Text: Thread for Twitter, paragraph for LinkedIn, story for Reddit. Playwright handles this.

slides.headline: Step 3: Platform-specific hooks
slides.body: TikTok: Question in first 2 seconds. LinkedIn: Professional angle. Reddit: Community-specific framing. Twitter: Hot take version. Same core content.

slides.headline: Step 4: Schedule distribution
slides.body: Best times per platform: TikTok 7-9pm, LinkedIn 8am, Twitter 11am, Reddit 9am. Queue all in one sitting. Playwright posts automatically.

slides.headline: The results
slides.body: Time investment: 30 min create + 15 min schedule = 45 min total. Output: 9 platforms × 1 post = 9 posts. Reach: 34,000 combined impressions.

slides.headline: Get the automation scripts
slides.body: Playwright multi-poster code. Platform timing cheatsheet. Content adaptation templates. Link in bio.

slides.headline: Grew email list from 0 to 8,400 in 90 days
slides.body: No ads. No giveaways. Just 5 lead magnets. Here's what worked.

slides.headline: Lead magnet 1: ROI calculator
slides.body: Interactive tool. Example: 'Calculate your SaaS pricing'. Collects email for results. Conversion rate: 34%. Signups: 2,100.

slides.headline: Lead magnet 2: Swipe file
slides.body: Collection of proven examples. Example: '47 cold email subject lines that book calls'. PDF delivery. Conversion rate: 28%. Signups: 1,800.

slides.headline: Lead magnet 3: Checklist
slides.body: Actionable step-by-step list. Example: 'Pre-launch checklist for apps'. One-page PDF. Conversion rate: 31%. Signups: 1,600.

slides.headline: Lead magnet 4: Template pack
slides.body: Ready-to-use files. Example: 'Notion dashboard templates'. Immediate download. Conversion rate: 41%. Signups: 2,200.

slides.headline: Lead magnet 5: Video training
slides.body: 12-minute walkthrough. Example: 'How to validate ideas in 48 hours'. Email required for access. Conversion rate: 22%. Signups: 700.

slides.headline: Distribution strategy
slides.body: Reddit posts: 2,400 signups. Twitter thread CTAs: 1,800 signups. LinkedIn articles: 1,600 signups. Blog post upgrades: 2,200 signups. YouTube descriptions: 400 signups.

slides.headline: Went from $2k/month (1 stream) to $18k/month (7 streams)
slides.body: Same audience. Same effort. Here's the exact revenue breakdown.

slides.headline: Stream 1: Digital products ($4,200/month)
slides.body: Templates, checklists, swipe files. Example: Notion templates at $29 each. Sales: 145/month. Low maintenance once created.

slides.headline: Stream 2: Course/cohort ($3,800/month)
slides.body: One course, run twice/month. Price: $199. Students: 19/month average. Time: 4 hours/week. High margin.

slides.headline: Stream 3: Affiliate commissions ($2,600/month)
slides.body: Tools you actually use. Example: ConvertKit, Notion, Riverside. Average: 8-12 signups/week. Commission: $50-200 per signup.

slides.headline: Stream 4: Sponsorships ($3,200/month)
slides.body: 2 sponsors/month at $1,600 each. Newsletter + Twitter thread + video mention. Audience: 12,000 email, 18,000 Twitter.

slides.headline: Stream 5: Consulting ($2,400/month)
slides.body: 4 hours/month at $600/hour. Only take projects that become content. Example: Client app audit = case study post.

slides.headline: Stream 6: App revenue ($1,200/month)
slides.body: 2 small apps with subscriptions. Example: Focus timer app at $3/month. 400 active subscribers combined. Passive income.
